name: Tokachi Detective: The Balloon Case
short_description: In the far south of Tokyo, the Ogasawara Islands. A wealthy individual ascended to high altitudes in a hot air balloon and died from lack of oxygen. At first, she thought it was an accident. There were suspicious elements, however.
detailed_description:
Just take a balloon ride and use your sycophancy. That's all I had to do, and I should be fine.

I was naive.

The rich man was erased. Why? No, more importantly, who killed him?

Tokachi, you wouldn't have a problem with that, would you?

--------------------------------------------------------------------

Your memories are reset every week, and you always return to being 18 years old. As detective "tokachi," you descend upon the mysterious remote island of Soraga Island.

This game is a new type of chat/sound novel that progresses through dense text and dialogue in the style of amagi hazime.

Through the eyes of tokachi, players will relive the events that take place on the island and at home.

Take on the challenge of a 2-hour, cinematic mystery while enjoying the music that was commissioned and prepared specifically for this game!

----------------------------------------------------------------

  • Playtime: 2-3 hours

  • Streamer Mode Available: If you plan to stream the game, please activate Streamer Mode by clicking the button in the bottom-right corner of the menu screen (it will display a red frame when successfully enabled). When Streamer Mode is on, the story progression will be interrupted at certain points to prevent spoilers.
